gap_widening.hypothesis: sed_run1 gap > awake gap (modes decouple under propofol)

delta_delta_correlation.description: cross-subject correlation of delta_r (awake-sed spec_sens) vs delta_gap (awake-sed eigenvalue gap). Deltas are awake minus sed: positive delta_r = sensitivity loss, negative delta_gap = gap widening. A NEGATIVE r supports the hypothesis.
